name: Exa - Search Engine
description: Knowledge for using Exa — an AI-native search engine. The exa-py SDK provides web search, content retrieval, AI-generated answers, similar-page discovery, and structured JSON output.
brief: You can use the Exa search engine for web search, content retrieval, and AI answers. Load this skill with `use_skill('exa-search')`.
author: Robin Syihab

variables.name: EXA_API_KEY
variables.label: Exa API Key
variables.description: API key for Exa search engine authentication.
